name: Raspberry-Chocolate Coffee Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Fresh or unsweetened frozen (thawed) Raspberries
recipeInstructions:
----------------------------------STREUSEL----------------------------------
1/4 cup Firm margarine or butter
1/3 cup All-purpose flour
1/4 cup Sugar
1/3 cup Slivered almonds
Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease a 9 x 9 x 2-inch square pan.
Beat all ingredients except chocolate chips, raspberries and Streusel in a medium bowl on low speed for 30 seconds. Beat on medium speed for 2 minutes, scraping the bowl occasionally. Spread half of the batter in the pan. Sprinkle with half each of the chocolate chips, raspberries and Streusel. Repeat layers. Bake about 50 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean. (12 pieces; 330 calories per piece).
If using self-rising flour, omit baking powder and salt.
STREUSEL: Cut margarine into flour and sugar until crumbly. Stir in nuts.
